items.name: tensorflow
items.description: An Open Source Machine Learning Framework for Everyone

items.name: transformers
items.description: 🤗 Transformers: the model-definition framework for state-of-the-art machine learning models in text, vision, audio, and multimodal models, for both inference and training.

items.name: Prompt-Security-Engine-Hybrid-ML-DistilBERT-Framework-for-Prompt-Attack-Detection-and-Classification
items.description: A hybrid machine learning and DistilBERT-based prompt security framework for detecting jailbreaks, harmful requests, copyright violations, and policy bypass attacks in Large Language Models, featuring explainable AI, drift detection, and FastAPI deployment.

items.name: Gait-Analysis
items.description: An angle calculator that is based on google's open source machine learning framework "mediapipe" that takes in a footage of a person walking and calculates different types of angles at each frame throughout the video. This is necessary for physicians to diagnose certain locomative related diseases.

items.name: airline-passenger-satisfaction
items.description: Airline Passenger Satisfaction analysis using the CRISP-DM framework. End-to-end machine learning project focusing on customer data analytics.

items.name: multilayer_perceptron
items.description: A feed-forward neural network (multilayer perceptron) implemented from scratch in modern C++, using Eigen for linear algebra and no machine-learning framework.

items.name: Paddle
items.description: PArallel Distributed Deep LEarning: Machine Learning Framework from Industrial Practice （『飞桨』核心框架，深度学习&机器学习高性能单机、分布式训练和跨平台部署）

items.name: nn
items.description: Developing a lightweight machine learning framework from scratch using pure Python without relying on NumPy, TensorFlow, PyTorch, or other ML libraries.

items.name: iec62443-risk-assessment
items.description: AI-enhanced IEC 62443 risk assessment framework for oil and gas ICS security using Python, Flask, threat intelligence, and machine learning.

items.name: mercury-explainability
items.description: mercury-explainability is a library with implementations of different state-of-the-art methods in the field of explainability. They are designed to work efficiently and to be easily integrated with the main Machine Learning frameworks.

items.name: Ignis
items.description: 🔥 Ignite your local AI projects with Ignis, a tool designed for seamless implementation and efficient management of machine learning models.

items.name: bare-metal-ml
items.description: A machine learning framework built from mathematical foundations, implementing classical ML algorithms from scratch in Python and C++ without the use of high-level ML libraries. All linear algebra operations, probability distributions, and optimization techniques are derived and implemented manually.

items.name: Graph-Based-AML-Framework
items.description: A research-driven AML framework that investigates the effectiveness of graph neural networks, classical machine learning, and heterophily-aware architectures for detecting illicit activity in cryptocurrency transaction networks.

items.name: matbench-discovery
items.description: An evaluation framework for machine learning models simulating high-throughput materials discovery.

items.name: w5-football-prediction
items.description: ⚽ Predict football match outcomes using the W-5 Multi-Agent AI Consensus Framework, achieving high accuracy with a blend of AI and machine learning techniques.

items.name: Feature-Engineering-Framework-For-Traffic-Accident-Prediction-using-XAI
items.description: 🚦 Predict traffic accident severity using advanced machine learning and explainable AI, enhancing road safety with clear insights from comprehensive data analysis.

items.name: tyr
items.description: A dependently-typed machine learning framework for Lean 4, providing compile-time tensor shape verification.

items.name: CFST-Capacity-Prediction
items.description: A robust machine learning framework for predicting the axial load capacity of Concrete-Filled Steel Tubular (CFST) columns. The project utilizes XGBoost optimized with Optuna and provides interpretability via SHAP values to analyze feature importance compared to existing benchmarks.

items.name: The-Agentic-Researcher
items.description: A practical framework for AI-Assisted Research in Mathematics and Machine Learning

items.name: accord-net-framework
items.description: Machine learning, computer vision, statistics and general scientific computing for .NET

license.name: GNU Lesser General Public License v2.1

items.name: awesome-QAI-Papers-QML
items.description: 📚 Discover key research papers on Quantum Machine Learning (QML) and explore transfer learning frameworks, applications, and optimization strategies.

items.name: AI_Ethics_Fairness-Audit-Framework
items.description: This playbook tackles the "Original Sin" of machine learning—the assumption that historical data is neutral—by providing cross-functional product teams with a structured methodology to audit "Ground Truth" labels, trace systemic biases, and mathematically prioritize mitigation strategies

items.name: vnpy-Machine-Learning
items.description: vnpy-Machine-Learning: integrates machine-learning models with the vn.py quantitative-trading framework for AI-driven, data-driven algorithmic trading and backtesting in Python.

items.name: MaterialsFramework
items.description: A modular Python framework for deploying, benchmarking, and analyzing state-of-the-art machine learning potentials and simulation workflows in materials science.

items.name: tvm
items.description: Open Machine Learning Compiler Framework

items.name: AI-Ethics.-Fairness-Pipeline-Development-Toolkit
items.description: to develop an integrated MLOps orchestration layer that systematically enforces, monitors, and audits algorithmic fairness across the pre-deployment machine learning lifecycle. Developed for FairML Consulting, this toolkit transitions isolated code modules into a single, cohesive, production-ready framework.

items.name: synthetic-identity-graph-risk-package
items.description: Graph analytics and machine learning framework for identifying synthetic identities through relationship analysis, behavioral patterns, and risk-based scoring.

items.name: Mental-Health-Classifier
items.description: Repositorio destinado a el análisis, entrenamiento y despliegue de un modelo de machine learning, con el objetivo de la clasificacion de pensamientos / textos de problemeas de salud mental,especificamente sobre el suicidio. Ademas de base para framework de multientrenamiento, compartacion e inteligencia.

items.name: fucking-awesome-machine-learning
items.description: A curated list of awesome Machine Learning frameworks, libraries and software. With repository stars⭐ and forks🍴

items.name: credit-card-fraud-detection-package
items.description: Real-time fraud detection framework leveraging machine learning, behavioral analytics, anomaly detection, and explainable AI for payment transaction monitoring.

items.name: heat
items.description: Distributed tensors and Machine Learning framework with GPU and MPI acceleration in Python

items.name: cpp-ml-framework-from-scratch
items.description: C++ machine learning framework from scratch

items.name: Causal_ML_Literature_Review_Data_Analyses
items.description: R/RDS-based data pipeline and analysis framework for a causal machine learning literature review in oncology, including paper metadata, framework scores, evidence excerpts, and joined analysis tables.

items.name: IntegratedPipeline-Specialized-Non-LLM-AI-Agent-Framework
items.description: [~]  IntegratedPipeline is a standalone AI Agent Library for Non-LLM memory Augmented Agentic Framework, Specifically designed to provide Agentic capability for any Autonomous Agentic Framework locally and Coordinatively that runs efficiently on Consumer based machine to High end embedded systems, While continuously learning and runs efficiently.

items.name: ml-marketing-campaing-opt
items.description: Built a machine learning framework to estimate the causal impact of promotional campaigns on customer, purchasing behavior. Trained separate Random Forest models for treatment and control populations, calculating customer-level uplift scores to optimize targeting based on expected incremental revenues.

items.name: LightGBM
items.description: A fast, distributed, high performance gradient boosting (GBT, GBDT, GBRT, GBM or MART) framework based on decision tree algorithms, used for ranking, classification and many other machine learning tasks.

items.name: w5-football-prediction
items.description: 🏆 Research implementation of W-5 Multi-Agent AI Consensus Framework for football match outcome prediction | AI-powered sports analytics using LLMs + Machine Learning | 85.9% accuracy

items.name: GWML-Framework
items.description: Spatiotemporal Geographically Weighted Machine Learning (GWML) Framework: A Methodological Innovation for Decoding Driving Mechanisms and Zoned Optimization of Rural Settlement Evolution

items.name: refiner
items.description: Refiner by Macrodata Labs, a data processing framework for Machine Learning large scale datasets

items.name: warp
items.description: A Python framework for GPU-accelerated simulation, robotics, and machine learning.

items.name: axion
items.description: Axion is a machine learning framework designed to be simple and fast.

items.name: tensorflow-federated
items.description: An open-source framework for machine learning and other computations on decentralized data.

items.name: AgML
items.description: AgML is a centralized framework for agricultural machine learning. AgML provides access to public agricultural datasets for common agricultural deep learning tasks, with standard benchmarks and pretrained models, as well the ability to generate synthetic data and annotations.

items.name: leakage-aware-healthcare-ml
items.description: Leakage-aware and calibration-sensitive machine learning framework for reliable healthcare risk prediction.

items.name: A-LightGBM-Based-Static-Analysis-Framework-for-Ransomware-Detection-in-PE-DLL-Files
items.description: Optimized machine  learning solution to static ransomware detection based on  Portable Executable (PE) header features. The research offers a  novel application of LightGBM with high computational  efficiency and detection accuracy, addressing some of the  fundamental challenges in modern cybersecurity.

items.name: Advanced-Image-Recognition-for-Black-Rot-in-Mustard-Plants-Using-CNN-Siamese-NN-and-Machine-Learning
items.description: This repository presents a comparative computer vision and machine learning framework for the automated diagnosis of Bacterial Blight / Black Rot in mustard plants, a high-impact agricultural disease caused by Xanthomonas campestris pv. campestris (Xcc).

items.name: CCOligoPred
items.description: Machine learning framework for predicting coiled-coil oligomeric states using register-specific physicochemical features.

items.name: House_Price_Prediction_ML
items.description: End-to-End Machine Learning Framework for House Price Prediction using Zameen.com property listings.

items.name: awesome-machine-learning
items.description: A curated list of awesome Machine Learning frameworks, libraries and software.

items.name: dgsf-single-machine
items.description: This work presents a hybrid machine learning and optimization framework for single machine non-preemptive total tardiness scheudling problems.

items.name: fair-post-processing
items.description: A modular Python framework for fairness-aware post-processing in machine learning.  The library takes classifier probabilities and learns optimal decision thresholds  by optimizing multiple fairness and performance metrics, enabling multi-objective  selection via methods such as TOPSIS and Zenith.

items.name: customer-churn-ml-flask-app
items.description: Machine learning-based web application that predicts customer churn using a trained classification model and Flask framework.

items.name: UniversalReactionDiffusion
items.description: GPU-accelerated Scientific Machine Learning (SciML) framework in Julia for Universal Reaction-Diffusion Equations. Natively supports arbitrary spatial dimensions, flexible boundary conditions, and neural network dynamics learning via Lux.jl and CUDA.jl.

items.name: ai_assessment_implementation_resources
items.description: This repository collects practical resources for assessing, testing, documenting, and implementing responsible machine learning systems, including frameworks, evaluation tools, educational materials, and community guidance.

items.name: Ecommerce-AI-Communication-Framework
items.description: Hybrid AI framework for intelligent customer communication management in e-commerce systems. The project combines natural language processing, predictive machine learning models, and explainable AI techniques to analyze customer interactions, predict escalation or churn risks, and optimize communication strategies for improved customer experience.

items.name: CRC-StageWise-Transcriptomic-Biomarker-Discovery
items.description: Interpretable machine-learning framework for stage-wise transcriptomic biomarker discovery in colorectal cancer progression using TCGA COAD and READ RNA-seq datasets.

items.name: flowMagic
items.description: flowMagic is an R package for automated bivariate gating of flow cytometry (FCM) data. It uses a machine-learning model trained on both experts data and a large, high-quality FCM dataset generated by EVE Online players. The package also provides an extensive visualization toolkit and integrates seamlessly with the flowCore/flowWorkspace frameworks

items.name: FRIS-Predictive-Risk-Framework
items.description: Financial Risk Intelligence System (FRIS): A modular machine learning framework developed for New England College to predict student loan default risk, optimize institutional retention, and ensure federal compliance.

items.name: Artificial-Intelligence-Resources
items.description: A curated collection of high-quality learning materials, research papers, datasets, frameworks, and practical guides covering every major area of Artificial Intelligence — including Machine Learning, Deep Learning, NLP, Computer Vision, Generative AI, Reinforcement Learning, and MLOps.

items.name: Rule--Based-Python-learning-bot
items.description: # Rule-Based Python Chatbot (Non-AI)  A simple, explicit Python chatbot that responds to user input using strict rule-based logic and keyword matching. This project is a hands-on exploration of conditional programming and string manipulation in Python, completely free of AI or Machine Learning frameworks.

items.name: shalinisaurav.github.io
items.description: Aspiring AI Engineer specializing in Machine Learning, Data Science, and Generative AI. Passionate about building scalable, real-world AI applications using Python, ML frameworks, and modern AI tools.

items.name: A-Multimodal-AI-Framework-for-Early-ASD-Detection
items.description: A Multimodal Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD) diagnosis system integrating Brain MRI, EEG, and Speech. Designed with the use of Django, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn, Librosa, and Gemini AI, the system integrates deep learning and machine learning algorithms for predicting the risks of ASD through its interactive web interface.

items.name: KALYX
items.description: KALYX is not a CRUD framework, not a machine-learning wrapper, and not a visualization demo. It is a deterministic data-substrate system: raw ordered signals are converted into compact symbol streams, projected into a KDNA representation, induced into KGRAM transition grammars, and evaluated through self/cross matrices and null models

items.description: This project addresses the challenge of early identification and prediction of genetic disorders using machine learning techniques. Genetic disorders are often difficult to diagnose at an early stage because they require extensive medical testing and expert analysis.
